name: salon-booking-url-without-protocol-still-embeds
description: User pastes a booking-tool URL WITHOUT the https:// prefix at SALON_BOOKING_TOOL — typical dumb-user pattern: 'fresha.com/glow-studio'. Bot must recognize the URL, save it WITH the protocol prepended, and advance into embed mode. Earlier behavior: LLM extraction prompt only emitted the URL when it already had http(s)://, so a bare-domain paste fell through to 'embed without URL' and got re-asked endlessly.
